name: Our Secret Sirloin Steak
recipeIngredient: 2 Tablespoons lemon juice or lime juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/4 cup of the Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, oil, minced onion, salt, and minced garlic in a bowl. Mix well and set aside.
2. Place the sirloin steak in a tight-fitting bowl or plastic bag. Pour the Worcestershire sauce mixture over the steak.
3. Marinate for 2 hours.
4. Remove the steak from the marinade.
5. Place the steak on a rack.
6. Grill over hot charcoal or broil under preheated hot broiler for 7 to 10 minutes on each side, or until done as desired. Brush occasionally with leftover marinade.
7. Remove the steak to a serving plate.
8. In a small saucepan, melt butter. Stir in parsley and the remaining 1 teaspoon Worcestershire sauce. Pour over the steak.
9. Slice and serve.
